data.content: Plan drafted for searchable CLI model selection. Key decisions: (1) Bun-based TypeScript selector script (scripts/select-models.ts) using @inquirer/search or @clack/prompts, invoked from bash scripts when model count > 15 and bun is available. (2) Existing numbered list preserved as fallback. (3) Five implementation steps: add library, create selector script, add bash helper, modify _collect_discovered_models() in both setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh, write tests. Estimated 3-5 hours, medium complexity, low-medium risk. Primary risk is library/Bun compatibility—mitigated by fallback path. Ready for plan_review gate.
